Text: Thank you for playing the mod!

News.Title: The reaper is here!
Text: Thank you for playing the mod!
- New Universal modifier has been added: Soulless.

News.Title: Lets go gambling!
News.SubTitle: Aw, dang it :(

News.Title: TownOfExtra v1.0.4
News.SubTitle: More roles & bugfixes!
Text: Thank you for playing the mod!
- New Impostor Power role has been added: Eraser.
- New Neutral Outlier role has been added: Switcher.
- Fixed trickster fake bodies getting automatically removed when placed.

News.Title: TownOfExtra v1.0.5
Text: Thank you for playing the mod!
- New Impostor Killing role has been added: Tagger.
- Fixed gambler not teleporting back to bodies.

News.Title: TownOfExtra v1.1.0
Text: Thank you for playing the mod!
- Most impostor roles now use the default colour
- A new Crewmate Passive modifier has been added: Fragile.

News.Title: TownOfExtra v1.1.1
Text: Thank you for playing the mod!
- A new Crewmate Power role has been added: Chief.

News.Title: TownOfExtra v1.1.2
Text: Thank you for playing the mod!
- A new Impostor Power role has been added: Vinculator.
- Fixed the trickster role (it should finally work now).

News.Title: TownOfExtra v1.1.3
Text: Thank you for playing the mod!
- A new Neutral Outlier role has been added: Vulture.
- Fixed? a lobby crashing bug with the soulless modifier.

News.Title: TownOfExtra v1.1.4
Text: Thank you for playing the mod!
- The gambler role now shows a notification for what ability you recieved
- Added list of recruited players & shot players for chief role
- New modifier icon for the Routine modifier
- New button icon for the Vinculator Empower Button
- Fixed chief being able to recruit even with 0 uses left

News.Title: TownOfExtra v1.1.5
Text: Thank you for playing the mod!
- New role icons for: Freezer, Gambler

News.Title: TownOfExtra v1.1.6
Text: Thank you for playing the mod!
- A new Impostor Power role has been added: Conjurer
- A new Impostor Concealing role has been added: Holographer
- New icon for the Signal Jammer role

News.Title: TownOfExtra v1.2.0
Text: Thank you for playing the mod!
- A new Impostor Power role has been added: Dream Caster
- A new Neutral Outlier role has been added: Poltergeist
- New Role Icons have been added for: Conjurer, Eraser, Chief, Vulture
- New Modifier Icons have been added for: Heavy Workload
- New Button Icons have been added for: Chain
- Fixed trickster's name showing on the body screen when a real body is reported
- Fixed vinculator's chain menu being openable while already open
- Fixed signal jammer getting people stuck in a wierd softlocked state
- Fixed chief acting like people are shot even when shielded
- Fixed gambler not working for non host
- Fixed eraser not erasing the target's roles
- Tou: Mira's cleric role can now cleanse ToEx's bad effects
- Added new icons for some roles special effects: Switcher, Chief, Eraser, Tagger
- Removed the no body gambler effect

News.Title: TownOfExtra v1.2.1
Text: Thank you for playing the mod!
- Fixed poltergeist's possess button sometimes not ending the game when it should.
- Fixed eraser not working for non host
- Fixed gambler sometimes giving all effects and crashing servers
